ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment where the simulation was run */,
  "environment_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment version used for the simulation */,
  "simulation_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation version */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation run */,
  "simulation_config" TEXT /* Simulation configuration */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the simulation status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the simulation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_environment_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_version_id") REFERENCES environment_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_simulation_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_version_id") REFERENCES simulation_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of the environment */,
  "environment_config" TEXT /* Environment configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "time_step" INTEGER /* Time step of the state */,
  "cart_position" REAL /* Cart position at the time step */,
  "cart_velocity" REAL /* Cart velocity at the time step */,
  "pole_angle" REAL /* Pole angle at the time step */,
  "pole_angular_velocity" REAL /* Pole angular velocity at the time step */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature at the time step */,
  "state_description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation state */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken at this state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_states_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "return_value" REAL /* Return value of the simulation */,
  "discounted_return_value" REAL /* Discounted return value of the simulation */,
  "simulations_count" INTEGER /* Number of simulations run */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_metrics_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "user_profile" TEXT /* User profile information */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "param_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_parameters_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_change_log" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_versions_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_change_log" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path */,
  "file_size" REAL /* File size in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., configuration, data) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "file_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_files_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
